messages.content: what is the earliest age you can test for ADHD in texas. Also, what is the process to request this ADHD test for a 4 year old in texas.

As an AI language model, I do not have access to specific state regulations or information. However, in general, ADHD can be diagnosed as early as age 4. The process to request an ADHD test for a 4 year old in Texas may vary depending on the specific school district or healthcare provider. It is recommended to speak with the child's pediatrician or contact the local school district to inquire about the evaluation and referral process for ADHD testing.

rewrite the following email line in brief, intellectual, human resource, and accommodating tone: Hello -  I appreciate the update. I’ll pass on the news to Chandrakala.    My ticket was approved this week to reuse the same req to continue our recruiting efforts.  So all the job postings will be back up and I’ll notify the agency partners that your role is back open.  To add, leadership has instructed us to plug in the Internal WK Sourcing Team to these eO Tech roles.  The sourcing manager has me on standby for next steps.  I believe this team will be reaching out to each hiring manager to set up a 1x1 call with their dedicated specialist to kick off the efforts.  I shared the sourcing team workflow below to help with the partnreship expectations.    @Oswana, Gregory – the sourcing team will also be reaching out to you for your two open roles.    Please let me know if any further clarification or information is needed in the meantime.

Dear [recipient],

Thank you for the update and keeping me in the loop. I appreciate your efforts in making this happen. I will make sure Chandrakala is aware of the news. 

I wanted to inform you that my ticket for reuse of the same req has been approved. Therefore, all job postings will be back up and running soon, and I will notify the agency partners that your role is now open again. 

Additionally, our leadership team has instructed us to include the Internal WK Sourcing Team for the eO Tech roles. The sourcing manager has me on standby for our next steps, and I believe this team will reach out to each hiring manager to set up a 1x1 call with their dedicated specialist. Please take a look at the sourcing team workflow below to help with the partnership expectations.

Also, @Oswana, Gregory – Please be aware that the sourcing team will also be in touch with you for your two open roles.

If you need any further clarification or information, please do not hesitate to let me know.

Thank you again for your hard work and dedication.

Best regards, [Your Name]

Thank you for that update. I”ll be sure to update both candidates.  

Another note – I wanted to ask if this past idea/question we exchanged below is something you still want to entertain or not? 

“Did your idea of offering up a lower level role make any progress? This will help me know if you are considering candidates for both levels  or just the current level now.  I want to make sure no candidates are falling through the cracks in case you have the possibility of a lower level role opening up in the future. “

Dear [Recipient],

Thank you for the update. I appreciate your dedication to our recruitment efforts. 

I also wanted to touch base about a previous idea/question that we had discussed. Would you still like to entertain the possibility of offering a lower-level role? This information would help me understand what we should be considering for our candidates. I want to make sure we are not overlooking any talented candidates in case there is an opportunity for a lower-level role to open up in the future. 

Thank you for your time, and please let me know your thoughts on this matter.

Best regards,
[Your Name]

rewrite the following email line in brief, intellectual, human resource, and accommodating tone: Hello -  It does not mean they will try to fill it internally.  This is one of the triggers that leadership activates when a role is not filled within the time limits they are tracking too.  I shared our recruiting process during our kickoff email/call. If you click on the link, you will be able to review TA recruiting resources.

Dear [Recipient],

I hope this email finds you well. I wanted to share some additional information regarding the status of the open role we are recruiting for.

To clarify, the role being listed internally does not necessarily mean that leadership is actively trying to fill it internally.  This is just one of the triggers that leadership activates when a role is not filled within the designated timeframe. 

In case you missed it, I have previously shared our recruiting process in our kickoff email/call. If you click on the provided link, you will be able to review TA recruiting resources.

Please do not hesitate to reach out if you have any further questions or concerns. Thank you for your time and assistance with this recruitment effort.

Best regards,
[Your Name]

REWRITE - Hi Frank,

I appreciate the follow up and the interest in our company.  This role’s status is currently “frozen” right now due to lack communication from the hiring manager team. Ever since the hiring manager went on leave, we have not received any updates. I believe their target hiring date has changed and it’s not as urgent at the moment.    Trust me, as soon as I get an update from the team, I’ll be presenting your profile again for consideration.  I  have you on my radar in case any other similar role opens up as well. Don’t hesitate to let me know if you see other roles that catch your eye so I can provide you the recruiter assigned for that role so you can follow up directly.

Dear Frank,

Thank you for your recent follow up and continued interest in our company. At this time, I wanted to provide you with an update on the status of the role you had applied for.

Regrettably, the role’s status is currently "frozen" due to a lack of communication from the hiring manager team. Since the hiring manager took leave, we have not received any updates on the position. It seems their target hiring date has changed, and it's not as urgent for the moment. Please be assured that I am actively monitoring the situation, and as soon as I have any news, I will immediately present your profile again for consideration.

Moreover, I want to assure you that I have noted your profile for any similar roles that may open up in the future. So, please do not hesitate to inform me of any roles that catch your eye, and I will provide you the recruiter responsible for that post. 

Thank you again for your patience and interest. Please feel free to contact me with any questions or concerns.

Sincerely,
[Your Name]

rewrite the following email line in brief, intellectual, human resource, and accommodating tone
:  Vince
 - hope your week is going well.  My manager gave me the heads that I'm going to be assigned as the recruiter for your role.  I will follow up in a email shortly on next steps. I wanted to ask really quick if your position has a pre-identified candidate before I review the details of the req? 2nd question is if the primary location of this role is required to be a remote position in only CT? If you prefer candidates in CT, but are open in the long run to consider remote candidates in other states. This answer helps me program the req to be open to both scenarios. Please let me know if any further clarification or information is needed.

Dear Vince,

I hope this email finds you well. I wanted to update you on your role and introduce myself as your recruiter. My manager has given me the heads-up that I will be working with you on this recruitment effort, and I will send a follow-up email shortly with next steps.

Before I delve into any details, I had a couple of quick questions to ask. Firstly, does your position have a pre-identified candidate? This information will help me program the recruitment process accordingly for this role.

Secondly, I would like to confirm if the primary location of this role is required to be a remote position in only CT. I understand your preference for candidates in CT but also want to ensure that we are open to remote candidates from other states. Your answer to this question will help me program the req to be open to both scenarios.

Please do not hesitate to let me know if you need any further clarification or information. I'm here to make the recruitment process as smooth and efficient as possible.

Thank you, and have a great week.

Best regards,
[Your Name]
